title: Application Developer (Python, Django & Fastapi)
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a skilled Application Developer to design, build, and support scalable web applications using Angular on the frontend and Python on the backend. The role involves developing secure APIs, creating intuitive user interfaces, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable and high-quality digital solutions across the application lifecycle.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain web applications using Angular and Python technologies

  • Build and integrate RESTful APIs using frameworks such as FastAPI, Flask, or Django

  • Implement responsive and user-centric interfaces aligned with UI/UX designs

  • Work closely with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions

  • Use Git for version control and contribute to CI/CD processes

  • Perform debugging, log analysis, and root cause troubleshooting

  • Support application deployment and resolve production issues

  • Apply analytical thinking to address complex technical challenges

Job Requirements

Essential Skills & Experience

  • Experience in full-stack or application development using Angular and Python

  • Hands-on knowledge of Python frameworks (FastAPI, Flask, Django)

  • Strong understanding of RESTful API design and integration

  • Proficiency in frontend development with Angular and responsive design principles

  • Experience using Git and CI/CD tools

  • Ability to debug and troubleshoot application and system issues

  • Strong problem-solving and communication skills

Preferred (Advantageous) Skills

  • Experience with cloud environments and modern deployment practices

  • Familiarity with containerization tools (e.g., Docker)

  • Exposure to Agile development methodologies

  • Knowledge of application monitoring and logging tools

    Next Step:

    If interested, you can click on “Apply here” or write an e-mail to dimple.jain@adecco.com with your updated resume.

    Dimple Jain
    EA LIcence No.91C2918
    Personnel Registration No.  R22107270

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
